response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong web/backend credentials (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but the role specifically demands a C++ developer with 8-12 years of hands-on C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IoT protocols, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a bachelor thesis project, with no evidence of industrial automation, secure development lifecycle, or relevant protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, MQTT at scale). Skills list does not even include C++.
strengths: 13+ years of software engineering with architecture and mentoring experience
Strong testing/TDD discipline and craftsmanship culture fit
Some embedded and low-latency systems exposure (DLang microservices, robotic arms)
concerns: Minimal recent C++ experience; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang
No demonstrated background in IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity
No exposure to industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) or automation domain

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering breadth and mentoring track record
